title: Blue Canyon Chloe Microfibre Bath Mats, Quick Dry & High Absorbent Bathroom Door Mat, Washable Area Rug for Living Room, Kitchen, Bathroom, Outdoor Rug, Home Decor Mattress, 1600GSM – Black
features: 【 SUPREMELY ABSORBENT 】: Protect your home from being the area around the swimming pool with our bath rug runner that has microfiber shags which absorb water quickly & helps capture extra moisture to keep your floor clean from dripping water while stepping out of your bathtub.

【 SOFT & PLUSH EXPERIENCE 】: You will definitely appreciate the luxury of standing on the Blue Canyon super soft & comfy bath mat made from premium microfibre, as it supports your ankles and feet to stand with utmost relief for a more extended period. The plush material of this rug is enjoyable on the skin, helps ease the stress on joints, and maintains a good posture.

【 ANTI-SLIP BACKING 】: Don’t worry about being fractured from dangerous slips and slides while getting out of your bathroom. Our high-performance Bath rug mat stays where you place it, as they come with rubber mat backing to ensure excellent grip, making it slip-resistant & eliminating the need for constant readjustments, and keeping your loved ones from falling.

【 MULTIPURPOSE USE 】: Our Blue Canyon microfiber luxury floor mats are great for hallways, entryways, family/living rooms, bedrooms, home offices, kitchens, dining rooms, drawing rooms, and anywhere from low traffic to elevated areas of your home. Each Pedestaling is specially woven to make any room in your home livelier and more comfortable, adding a subtle yet profound accent to any room in your house.

【 FANCIFUL STYLING 】: Make your home decor fun with our cheerful and vibrant Microfibre Bath Mat runners! Generously sized at 50 x 80 cm, these Pedestal mat rugs are suitable for most interior designs. Our fanciful styling door mats are available in classic patterns. You can layer them or mix and match them according to your room themes as they are designed keeping in mind the trending interior designing accessories.
